violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by produce and utensils on and in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Food items and utensils were moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Bread rolls were observed in a plastic container in the back storage area that was observed to have droppings in the bottom of container. Food items were voluntarily disposed of during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (deli slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. The deli slicer was disassembled, cleaned, and sanitized during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Sliced deli meats and cheeses was observed not marked with the date of slicing/preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Desserts and fruit cups packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Food items were removed from self-service area during the time of inspection. Food label guidance provided during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in the back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue working with pest control as frequently as necessary to maintain control of pest activity. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of various dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. Bowls were removed from containers during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the front service area prep unit and the 2-door reach-in in the back storage area. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/06/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the cookline stove, fryolator, and front service area prep unit gaskets have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces of equipment shall be cleaned at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. Outside dumpster was covered during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/06/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The hood ventilation system was observed to with drips forming on the Ansul discharge system. Establishment is to clean the hood ventilation system and filters at a frequency necessary to prevent the accumulation and formation of drips, dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 05/20/2026

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to continue to clean any and all droppings under equipment and shelves using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. Establishment is to continue to work with and increase pest control as frequently as needed. Pest control report was reviewed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The chest freezer lid, and the 2 door reach-in gasket was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings under equipment and shelves using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. Establishment is to increase pest control as frequently as needed and have a pest control report for next inspection. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The chest freezer lid, and the 2 door reach-in gasket was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Dishes and utensils were observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Dishes and utensils moved at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Meatballs were observed held at 110 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per PIC, meatballs were made and placed in hot hold unit 1 hour prior to inspection. Meatballs were reheated to 175 at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

Deli meat and cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Dates were added to food at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment is to clean any and all droppings under equipment and shelves using appropriate methods to clean and sanitize to monitor new activity. Establishment is to increase pest control as frequently as needed and have a pest control report for next inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/13/2025

The cutting boards in the prep area are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The chest freezer lid, and the 2 door reach-in gasket was not in good repair. Equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The floors and walls throughout the kitchen have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The hood system was observed with an accumulation of debris. Hood system is to be cleaned and serviced as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2025
